Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs
Off Calendar Oct-07-2022 Granted Per Written Order

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DAVID J. GALLO, Esq. of Law Offices of David J. Gallo (Tel: 858-509-3652) for plaintiffs;
Atty. CORRIE J. BUCK, Esq. of Reed Smith LLP (Tel: 213-457-8000) for defendant Albertsons LLC .

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF SOPHIA SADLOWSKI's Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/CK)
